children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), on the date on which a country ceases to be a USMCA country, the provisions of this title (other than this section) and the amendments made by this title shall cease to have effect with respect to that country.11See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Proceedings regarding protective orders and undertakings
children.label: 1 Proceedings regarding protective orders and undertakings
children.text: If on the date on which a country ceases to be a USMCA country an investigation or enforcement proceeding concerning the violation of a protective order issued under (as amended by this title ) or an undertaking of the government of that country is pending, the investigation or proceeding shall continue, and sanctions may continue to be imposed, in accordance with the provisions of such (as so amended).section 1677f(f) of this titlesection 1677f(f) of this title1

children.heading: Binational panel and extraordinary challenge committee reviews
children.label: 2 Binational panel and extraordinary challenge committee reviews
A
children.text: a binational panel review under article 10.12 of the USMCA is pending, or has been requested, or

children.label: B
children.text: an extraordinary challenge committee review under that article is pending, or has been requested,
